tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Patty Mills is one of Australia's most successful basketball players.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the NBA championship with the San Antonio Spurs in 2014.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Mills captained the Australian Boomers in several international tournaments.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Ben Simmons is known for his elite defense and playmaking abilities.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the NBA Rookie of the Year award in 2018.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Simmons is one of the tallest point guards in NBA history.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Andrew Bogut was one of Australia's most successful NBA centers.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the NBA championship with the Golden State Warriors in 2015.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Bogut was the number one pick in the 2005 NBA draft.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Josh Giddey is one of the most promising young Australian basketball players.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He became one of the youngest players in NBA history to record a triple double.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Giddey is known for his elite passing ability.

tab1.title: Description
tab1.content: Matthew Dellavedova became famous for his tough defensive play.

tab2.title: Achievements
tab2.content: He won the NBA championship with the Cleveland Cavaliers in 2016.

tab3.title: Facts
tab3.content: Dellavedova played alongside LeBron James during the Cavaliers championship run.
